0.text: Regression of consolidation areas in the middle lobe and lower lobes of the right lung compared to the previous examination

1.text: Atelectatic changes in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

2.text: Fibroatelectatic changes in the anterolateral basal segment and inferior lingular segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Newly revealed focal acinar infiltration areas in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
